testcase.name: runScenario["Launching the app", "Extension Auto Export Doc related testing"](1)
testcase.system-out:
✅ Browser launched successfully. 2025-09-01 03:50:28 [main] INFO com.winmore.utils.Log - ✅ Browser launched successfully. The Executing tag is >>>> AutoExportDoc Mail Recipients (from TestNG): amit.kumar@winmore.app napreprod
@ExtensionPart2 @AutoExportDoc Scenario: Launching the app # src/test/resources/Features/Extensions_AutoExportDoc.feature:4 2025-09-01 03:50:28 [main] INFO com.winmore.utils.Log - 🚀 Starting Scenario Execution... 🌍 Launching Winmore app on environment [napreprod] at: https://login-napreprod.lanetixstaging.com/ 2025-09-01 03:50:28 [main] INFO com.winmore.utils.Log - 🌍 Launching Winmore app on environment [napreprod] at: https://login-napreprod.lanetixstaging.com/ Launching app URL 2025-09-01 03:50:33 [main] INFO com.winmore.utils.Log - ✅ Application URL launched successfully. Given the user navigates to "Winmore" application # com.winmore.stepdefinitions.login.LoginSteps.the_user_navigates_to(java.lang.String) 2025-09-01 03:50:35 [main] INFO com.winmore.utils.Log - ✅ Verified presence of login screen successfully. Then the user verifying the presence of login page # com.winmore.stepdefinitions.login.LoginSteps.verifyThePresenceOFLoginScreen() 2025-09-01 03:50:35 [main] INFO com.winmore.utils.Log - 🏁 Scenario Execution Finished.

testcase.name: runScenario["Login into the app", "Extension Auto Export Doc related testing"](2)

failure.message: Failed to perform a standard click on locator '//a[contains(text(),'Aggregate Shipments')][1]': Error { message='Timeout 30000ms exceeded. =========================== logs =========================== waiting for locator("xpath=//a[contains(text(),'Aggregate Shipments')][1]") ============================================================ name='TimeoutError stack='TimeoutError: Timeout 30000ms exceeded. =========================== logs =========================== waiting for locator("xpath=//a[contains(text(),'Aggregate Shipments')][1]") ============================================================ at ProgressController.run (C:\Users\amyal\AppData\Local\Temp\playwright-java-4752265878314167441\package\lib\server\progress.js:93:26) at Frame.click (C:\Users\amyal\AppData\Local\Temp\playwright-java-4752265878314167441\package\lib\server\frames.js:945:23) at FrameDispatcher.click (C:\Users\amyal\AppData\Local\Temp\playwright-java-4752265878314167441\package\lib\server\dispatchers\frameDispatcher.js:146:30) at DispatcherConnection.dispatch (C:\Users\amyal\AppData\Local\Temp\playwright-java-4752265878314167441\package\lib\server\dispatchers\dispatcher.js:317:46) }
